title: draba bruce-bennettii
intro: Draba bruce-bennettii, also known as Bruce Bennett's whitlow grass, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of skin conditions, wounds, and inflammation. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has anti-inflammatory compounds, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing oxidative stress and promoting wound healing. Draba bruce-bennettii is often prepared as a tea or infused oil, which can be used topically to benefit from its medicinal properties.
